ogTitle: Neerim Junction vs Neerim North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Neerim Junction and Neerim North.
heading: Neerim Junction vs Neerim North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Neerim Junction, Victoria and Neerim North, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Neerim Junction has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Neerim North (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Neerim Junction or Neerim North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Neerim Junction has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Neerim North scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Neerim Junction scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Neerim North scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Neerim Junction or Neerim North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Neerim Junction has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
